image.title: NAJ Zhao, X Yang, C Wang, S Song, K Cao, T Wei, Q Ji, W Zheng, J Li, X Zhou, J Liu

item.title: Yidu-toxicity blocking lung decoction ameliorates inflammation in severe pneumonia of SARS-COV-2 patients with Yidu-toxicity blocking lung syndrome by eliminating IL-6 and TNF-a.
